title: quercus astrotricha
intro: Quercus astrotricha, a species of plant in the beech family, is native to China and is also known as the Chinese cork oak. The medicinal properties of Quercus astrotricha include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to prevent cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Quercus astrotricha can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and its bark, leaves, and roots are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
